In·the said notification, in serial number (ii), for the entries relating thereto, the following entries shall be substituted, namely :- "(ij) JusticeB. P. Das Retired Judge of the High Court of Orissa By Order and in the Name of the President of India. -Member". [F. No. 17/5/2012-BM] DHRUVVUAISINGH, Secy. Foot Note :-The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide number S.O. 45 !(E), dated the 2nd April, 2012. Printed by the Manager.
